title: xSyphon L2 parquet adapter + 17->27 day split remap to run the Jun-18 OSR gate on real data
source: Syphonix backtest data drop received 2026-06-16 (D:/PROJECTS/QuantHack/Syphonic_Backtest Data); README.txt
why: The real L2 data arrived as xSyphon pricer-output PARQUET ladders (time/sym/provider/bid/ask + ragged bidprices/bidsizes/askprices/asksizes, up to 5 levels, quotes only - no traded volume/OHLCV). But scripts/run_osr_validation.py (the B0166 Jun-18 gate) expects --csv data/l2/<SYM>.csv --spec configs/l2_colspec.json (bar-ified CSV + colspec). ADAPTER GAP: build parquet-ladder -> the OSR pipeline's expected input (consolidate the two provider channels CH01/CH02, handle ragged depth, bar-ify to the registered ~75 bars/day with L2 features). SPLIT GAP: the B0165 pre-registration assumed a 17-day sample (train d1-12 / val d13-17 / holdout final-5); the real drop is 27 days (2026-05-11..06-10) -> the train/val/holdout day split must be re-mapped onto real days WITHOUT peeking the holdout (preserve the pre-registration holdout refusal - route the mapping decision to devil's-advocate/risk-officer). COVERAGE: XAUUSD/XAGUSD/EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDJPY present; BTC/ETH/SOL ABSENT -> the registered crypto/lead-lag OSR trials cannot run on this data (only XAU/EURUSD/XAG). The tournament sim (B0183) concluded a return edge is ESSENTIAL and the OSR book is the only edge candidate -> this adapter gates the highest-leverage item.
value_rationale: Without the adapter the Jun-18 edge gate cannot run on real data; the sim says the edge is the difference between P(top100)=0.03-0.34 (flat) and 0.51-0.88 (edge). Highest-leverage pre-launch unblock.
scope: Parquet-ladder loader: read {SYM}_{date}.parquet, normalize ragged bid/ask price+size lists to fixed 5-level arrays, parse microsecond UTC time.
Provider consolidation rule for symbols with two channels (XAU/XAG have CH01+CH02): best-bid/offer merge or per-channel - decide and document.
Bar-ify to the registered geometry (~75 bars/day) producing the columns configs/l2_colspec.json expects; verify against run_osr_validation.py + tests/test_run_osr_validation.py.
Re-map the registered train/val/holdout day split from the assumed 17 days onto the real 27 days WITHOUT touching the holdout block (devil's-advocate/risk-officer sign-off on holdout integrity).
Run the gate for XAUUSD, EURUSD (+XAGUSD); record BTC/ETH/SOL as un-runnable (no data).
Feed realized spreads/depth/impact into the B0183 tournament-sim cost model (mu_field calibration).
recommendation: Build the adapter first (mechanical), then escalate the day-split remap as a pre-registration integrity decision before running the gate. Do NOT silently re-pick the split to flatter results.
out_of_scope: The OSR strategy logic (frozen by B0165 pre-registration); crypto (no data).

history.reason: Real L2 parquet drop arrived; needs an adapter to the OSR CSV+colspec input and a 17->27 day split remap before the Jun-18 gate.

Adapter built (pipeline/l2_adapter.py, 17 tests; provider=CH02 single coherent venue after measuring that BBO-merge manufactures crossed books). Train->validation ran on XAU/EUR/XAG, full-ladder AND top-of-book. RESULT: event-starved -- OSR signal fires <=8 validation trades/trial across all instruments+variants, so n_trades<30 -> Sharpe=NaN -> no edge measurable (NOT a measured negative). Holdout (days 19-27) NOT touched; split mapping proposed, awaiting CEO sign-off. Crypto un-runnable (no data).

OSR/L2 Jun-18 third-leg gate RATIFIED NO-GO by CEO 2026-06-17. The intraday OSR/L2 book will NOT be deployed in the live window; the bundle does not assemble. (B0184 event-starved + B0188 depth-parity false.)
